message: The other night, we had a surprise blackout. As I fumbled around for my flashlight, I was reminded of those simpler times before we relied so much on screens and gadgets. With only a few flashlights and a trusty power bank to keep our phones alive, my family and I decided to embrace the moment. We pulled out some board games, huddled under blankets, and shared stories by flashlight. It felt so refreshing to disconnect and rediscover the joy of low-tech fun! Who knew a little darkness could light up our creativity? Have you ever turned a blackout into a cozy adventure?
